TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Sudadatan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Sudadatan. 573 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,495 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 20% niqan 296 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 80% niqan 1,199 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 10%, Amis 8%, Tayal 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = sudadatan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ sudadatan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Sudadatan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Sudadatan. 573 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,495 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 20% niqan 296 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 80% niqan 1,199 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 10%, Amis 8%, Tayal 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = sudadatan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ sudadatan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%. pnjaħan pnatas
